name: Entrata Property Management API
what_it_does: Entrata Unified Property Management REST API for multifamily property management, leasing, and resident experience. Enables AI agents to manage end-to-end leasing workflow from application to move-in for multifamily automation, handle resident portal and self-service management for property operations, access AI-powered revenue management and dynamic pricing for rent optimization, retrieve integrated accounting and financial reporting for property management, manage property marketing and listing syndication for vacancy reduction, handle maintenance workflow and vendor management for operations, access smart home and IoT device management for resident technology, retrieve resident communication and engagement automation for retention, manage roommate matching and student housing workflow for student-specific operations, and integrate Entrata with screening, payments, insurance, and utility platforms.
use_cases: Automating leasing from prospect to move-in from leasing agents
Optimizing rents from revenue management agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without multifamily residential focus
Single-family rental at small portfolio scale
Short-term vacation rental without long-term lease management
best_when: A multifamily property management company using Entrata wants AI agents to automate the full leasing lifecycle, revenue management, maintenance, resident engagement, and property accounting.
avoid_when: FAIR HOUSING ACT AND DYNAMIC PRICING RISK: Automated revenue management and dynamic pricing algorithms must not create disparate impact on protected classes; automated rent pricing that correlates with neighborhood demographics creates Fair Housing Act exposure. Automated eviction workflow — automated delinquency and eviction processes must comply with state-specific eviction notice requirements, eviction moratoriums, and CARES Act protections for federally-backed properties; automated eviction filing without jurisdiction-specific rule validation creates wrongful eviction liability. AI revenue management regulatory scrutiny — algorithmic rent pricing using shared competitor data has attracted DOJ antitrust investigation (RealPage case); review revenue management algorithm compliance before automation.

auth.notes: Entrata uses API key and OAuth 2.0 with scopes. Documentation at developers.entrata.com. Lehi, Utah HQ. Founded 2003 as Property Solutions. Rebranded Entrata 2015. Private ($507M funding; Dragoneer, Stone Point Capital). 20,000+ communities. Unified multifamily platform competing with Yardi and RealPage for enterprise property management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-unit monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit monthly subscription; unified platform pricing
pricing.notes: Lehi, Utah. Founded 2003. Dragoneer/Stone Point-backed $507M. 20,000+ communities. Unified multifamily PMS. Competes with Yardi and RealPage for enterprise PMS.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FAIR HOUSING AND DYNAMIC PRICING: Automated revenue management must be tested for disparate impact on protected classes; algorithmic rent pricing using shared market data has attracted DOJ antitrust scrutiny (cf. RealPage investigation); review compliance before deploying pricing automation

Eviction process jurisdiction compliance — automated delinquency and eviction workflows must implement state-specific notice requirements (3-day, 5-day, 30-day notices) and eviction moratorium monitoring; automated eviction filing without jurisdiction validation creates wrongful eviction liability

CARES Act federally-backed property protections — properties with federally-backed mortgages (FHA, Fannie, Freddie) have CARES Act eviction protections; automated eviction workflows must check for federally-backed status before processing
FCRA tenant screening — automated credit and background check integration requires FCRA-compliant adverse action notice; automated denials without proper notice create federal compliance risk
Smart home IoT data privacy — Entrata smart home features generate resident behavior data; automated IoT data collection must comply with state privacy laws and resident notification requirements
Integrated payment PCI scope — Entrata integrated payment processing is PCI DSS compliant; custom payment integrations must assess PCI scope and avoid expanding cardholder data environment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property management. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US. Tenant, lease, and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property management. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Tenant and payment data.
